name: Activity Feed
description: Chronological list of activity events with avatars, timestamps, and action descriptions

standard.description: Vertical timeline with avatar, user name, action text, timestamp. Grouped by date.

slots.content: Action text with user name (_fontmedium) and description
slots.load-more: Button at bottom to load older activities

compact.description: Dense list without avatars, just icon + text + relative time

slots.content: Action text in single line, truncated

detailed.description: Each activity is a mini-card with full context, attachments, and reply option

slots.card-body: Full action description and optional attachment preview

visual_brief: Vertical timeline of activity events grouped by date. Each date group starts with a muted, small-text date header. Individual feed items are horizontal rows: a circular avatar (with fallback initials) on the left, then a content block with the user name in medium-weight text followed by the action description in normal weight, and a relative timestamp (e.g. '2h ago') in small muted text right-aligned or below. Items are separated by subtle dividers or spacing. The compact preset drops avatars and uses small type-indicator icons instead. The detailed preset wraps each item in a bordered card with attachment previews and action buttons (reply, like).

responsive.mobile: Full-width feed. Avatar size reduces to 32px. Timestamp moves below the content text instead of right-aligned. Detailed preset card actions stack vertically. Load-more button goes full-width.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with avatars at 36px. Timestamp stays inline right-aligned. Comfortable spacing with gap3.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with 40px avatars. Generous spacing. Detailed preset shows attachment previews inline. Actions row is fully horizontal.

motion.micro: Feed item rows highlight on hover with subtle background transition over 150ms. Action buttons in detailed preset scale on hover.
motion.transitions: New activity items slide in from the top with 300ms ease-out translateY(-10px) to translateY(0) plus opacity 0 to 1. Staggered by 80ms per item when multiple arrive. Load-more items fade in from below.

slots.content: Action text with user name and description
slots.load-more: Button at bottom to load older activities

layout_hints.event_treatment: Each event row: small colored dot (8px, color by event type) + timestamp (mono-data, text-xs) + description. Hover: subtle bg highlight.
layout_hints.grouping: Group events by date. Date header: d-label with accent left-border. Today/Yesterday labels, then ISO dates.
layout_hints.empty_state: Encouraging: 'No activity yet. Publish your first item to see it here.'

composition.FeedItem: Row(d-data-row, hoverable) > [Avatar(fallback-initials) + Content(flex-col) > [UserName(font-medium) + ActionText] + Timestamp(mono-data, text-xs, text-muted)]
